parameters.name: min
parameters.label: Minimum Value
parameters.description: The minimum value that any of the channels in the output image can have.

parameters.name: max
parameters.label: Maximum Value
parameters.description: The maximum value that any of the channels in the output image can have.

parameters.name: positive
parameters.label: Positive Only
parameters.description: Apply an absolute value function after all other limits and quantizations are calculated e.g. all negatives are made positive.

parameters.name: norm
parameters.label: Normalize
parameters.description: Normalize values in the output image so that they are all scaled and shifted to fall between the Normalized Minimum and Maximum (0 to 1 by default). This operation requires multiple internal render pa

parameters.name: normmin
parameters.label: Normalize Minimum
parameters.description: The minimum value for pixels after normalization.

parameters.name: normmax
parameters.label: Normalize Maximum
parameters.description: The maximum value for pixels after normalization.

parameters.name: quantvalue
parameters.label: Quantize Value
parameters.description: The function used to quantize the pixel values in the output image.

parameters.name: vstep
parameters.label: Value Step
parameters.description: The quantization step size for pixel values.

parameters.name: voffset
parameters.label: Value Offset
parameters.description: An offset for the quantization step so that it doesn't have to lie on zero.

parameters.name: quantpos
parameters.label: Quantize Position
parameters.description: The function used for spacial quantization e.g. quantizing the UV coordinates so that pixel values are merged into larger blocks.

parameters.name: posstep
parameters.label: Position Step
parameters.description: The size of the spacial quantization step in UV space (0-1)

parameters.name: posoffset
parameters.label: Position Offset
parameters.description: An offset applied to the spacial quantization so that the steps do not have to start at 0,0 (measured in 0-1 UV space).

examples.label: Configure Mintype and Maxtype
examples.description: Common settings from 7 real Derivative examples
